rationale: Educ. Code §38.226 governs acceptance of gifts and donations by schools. It has no operative relationship to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal.
quote: A school district, open-enrollment charter school, or private school may accept gifts, grants, donations, and federal and local funds to implement this subchapter.
_note: No conflict; cited rule is unrelated to homestead exemption valuation.
